title: Sin grows in the dark. It dies in the light.
caption:
Sin grows in the dark. It dies in the light.

Scripture never says manage your struggle. It says put it to death, Romans 8:13, and the soft language is exactly where the grip starts. You can't kill what you've renamed a "thing you're working on."

Say the actual word. Lust. Laziness. Cowardice. Confess it to one man who isn't going anywhere. James 5:16: confession is what precedes healing, not the reward for it.

Then don't leave the space empty. Whatever you cut, decide now what replaces it.

Save this for the fight you keep having alone.

#faith #sin #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #christianity
